name: Real document gold set - extraction exhibit10-3.pdf
input_text: Extract the main subject, counterparties, key fields, servicing obligations, repurchase obligations, notices, governing law, and grounded action items from the selected agreement.
notes: Manual gold set prepared from Exhibit 10.3. The evaluator should prefer grounded contract obligations and governance terms instead of title-only extraction.

seven dollars ($7) per Mortgage Loan per month
